opportunities.title: Full Stack Software Engineer — San Francisco, CA
opportunities.description: Full Stack Software Engineer | San Francisco, CA | Full-time | ONSITE | $150K-$210K + equity We're an early-stage startup building a SaaS platform combining data infrastructure, pipelines, and AI agents for power systems. Small team, high ownership, founders in the room. What you'd own: - End-to-end features across frontend, backend APIs, and data pipelines - Data infra now → pipelines next → AI agent features by end of Q1 - Architecture decisions, not just implementation Stack: Python, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS/GCP, Docker Nice to have: Svelte, GraphQL, LLM agents, GIS/M

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Seeking individuals for simple online tasks.
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Seeking individuals for simple online tasks.

We’re looking for people to complete simple online tasks. The work involves completing assigned tasks by following detailed guidelines. Strong written communication skills, reliability, and attention to detail are important. • Flexible, independent work • Earn up to ₹1,000 per week • Payment is based on approved work If you’re interested, DM me “Interested” and I’ll reach out with more details. Note: This opportunity is open to applicants based in India only.   submitted by   /u/valeutic [link]   [comments]

opportunities.description:

  • Diagnose and repair equipment faults and perform preventative maintenance.
  • Provide excellent customer service and resolve equipment issue
